questionHtml: Calculate the length of the entire cell labelled Y, showing your working.
markschemeHtml:
50 μm = 27/28/29 mm, Y = 8/9/10 mm
OR
50 x 9 /27
OR
16.7 μm (accept answers in the range of 14.8 μm to 17.2 μm)

Award [1] for correct ratios not precise measurements in the work or [1] for correct answer with correct unit.

meta.title: Calculate the length of the entire cell labelled Y, showing your working.
